name: Badge
description: A small count or status indicator, typically overlaid on another element.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual variant controlling border, background, and text styles.

props.name: size
props.description: Badge size controlling padding, font size, and dot/close sizing.

props.name: colorScheme
props.description: Color scheme override. When unset, the variant's default color is used.

props.name: dot
props.description: Show a status dot before the badge label.

props.name: pulse
props.description: Animate the status dot with a ping effect. Requires `dot` to be true.

props.name: ping
props.description: Show a notification ping indicator on the badge corner.

props.name: interactive
props.description: Make the badge clickable with hover/focus styles and `kb-click` events.

props.name: closable
props.description: Show a close button that dismisses the badge with animation.

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Leading icon element rendered before the label.

events.name: kb-close
events.description: Close button clicked; badge animates out and removes itself.
